item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Mika+Grid 1.0.0

Initial release — macOS window snapping menu bar app.

  • 11 snap actions: halves, quarters, maximize, center, restore
  • Global keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Opt + arrow/letter keys)
  • Visual snap grid in menubar popover
  • Multi-monitor support
  • Customizable shortcuts with inline recorder
  • First-launch onboarding with accessibility permission guide
  • Launch at Login
